title: WATCH:  President Trump says Iran was 'going to attack if we didn't do it'
fullText: President Trump says Iran was 'going to attack if we didn't do it'President Trump told ABC News' Rachel Scott that Iran was "going to attack if we didn't do it" after she asked if Israel forced his hand to launch strikes against Iran.March 3, 2026
summary: President Trump told ABC News' Rachel Scott that Iran was "going to attack if we didn't do it" after she asked if Israel forced his hand to launch strikes against Iran.
